category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Argentina market access, IRAM certification, ENRE grid requirements, and INTI testing conformity.

title.en: China-to-Argentina Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Argentina IRAM certification, ENRE grid requirements, INTI testing, and Secretaría de Energía energy efficiency labelling obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与阿根廷IRAM认证、ENRE电网要求、INTI检测及能源秘书处能效标识义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與阿根廷IRAM認證、ENRE電網要求、INTI檢測及能源秘書處能效標識義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IRAM conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current IRAM, ENRE, INTI, ARCA, and Secretaría de Energía requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IRAM合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行IRAM、ENRE、INTI、ARCA及能源秘书处要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IRAM合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行IRAM、ENRE、INTI、ARCA及能源秘書處要求。

answer_first.en: Argentina requires IRAM product certification (or equivalent Certificado de Homologación) for listed motor categories and mandatory energy efficiency labelling aligned to IE classes under the Secretaría de Energía scheme; CCC is not recognised. Grid voltage is 380/220 V 50 Hz — the same as China — so no frequency or voltage redesign gap exists.
answer_first.zh: 阿根廷对列名电机类别要求IRAM产品认证（或等效的Certificado de Homologación），并要求按能源秘书处方案对齐IE等级的强制能效标识；CCC认证不被认可。电网电压为380/220 V 50 Hz，与中国相同，不存在频率或电压设计差距。
answer_first.zht: 阿根廷對列名電機類別要求IRAM產品認證（或等效的Certificado de Homologación），並要求按能源秘書處方案對齊IE等級的強制能效標識；CCC認證不被認可。電網電壓為380/220 V 50 Hz，與中國相同，不存在頻率或電壓設計差距。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
